'''Fordwyn''' was a Rebel agent. He masqueraded as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], appointed [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] [[Valiant (Victory-class)|''Valiant'']] near [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]. He aided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] by throwing three pursuing [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] off his trail.
